---
title: "run_all_models"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
stan_models <- c("wba_model.stan", "pba_model.stan")
scenarios   <- as.character(1:3)

for (stan_file_name in stan_models) {
  for (scenario in scenarios) {
    
    # Build path to data
    data_name <- file.path("scenario_data", scenario, paste0("scenario_", scenario, ".csv"))
    
    # Output folder = same scenario folder
    output_dir <- file.path("scenario_data", scenario)
    
    # Model filename
    model_prefix <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(stan_file_name)
    fitted_model_name <- paste0(model_prefix, "_scenario_", scenario, ".rds")
    
    source("fitting_script.R")
  }
}
```
